Interface TemporalExpression<T extends Temporal & Comparable<? super T>>

All Superinterfaces:
ComparableExpression<T>, Expression<T>, Selection<T>, TupleElement<T>
public interface TemporalExpression<T extends Temporal & Comparable<? super T>> extends ComparableExpression<T>
Type for temporal query expressions.
Since:
4.0

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    TemporalExpression<T>
    coalesce(Expression<? extends T> y)
    Create an expression that returns null if this and the argument evaluate to null, and the value of the first non-null expression otherwise.
    TemporalExpression<T>
    coalesce(T y)
    Create an expression that returns null if this and the argument evaluate to null, and the value of the first non-null expression otherwise.
    <N extends Number & Comparable<N>>
    NumericExpression<N>
    extract(TemporalField<N,T> field)
    Create an expression that returns the value of a field extracted from this date.
    TemporalExpression<T>
    nullif(Expression<? extends T> y)
    Create an expression that tests whether this expression is equal to the argument, returning null if they are and the value of the first expression if they are not.
    TemporalExpression<T>
    nullif(T y)
    Create an expression that tests whether this expression is equal to the argument, returning null if they are and the value of the first expression if they are not.

  • Method Details

    • extract

      <N extends Number & Comparable<N>> NumericExpression<N> extract(TemporalField<N,T> field)
      Create an expression that returns the value of a field extracted from this date.
      Parameters:
      field - a temporal field type
      Returns:
      expression for the value of the extracted field
      See Also:
      • CriteriaBuilder.extract(TemporalField, Expression)
